entity.summary: Permissionless decentralized automated-market-maker protocol in the Frax ecosystem, combining constant-product liquidity pools with embedded time-weighted average market maker orders for large trades and protocol liquidity operations.
entity.notes: HEI models Frax Swap, Fraxswap, and chain-specific Fraxswap discovery rows as one exchange entity. Current first-party documentation describes Fraxswap as a permissionless constant-product AMM with embedded TWAMM orders and publishes current V2 contract deployments across multiple networks.

evidence.title: Fraxswap Overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Fraxswap as a fully permissionless constant-product AMM with an embedded TWAMM for executing large trades over time.

evidence.title: Fraxswap Technical Specifications
evidence.notes: First-party technical documentation explains the Uniswap V2-style constant-product core and the live time-weighted average market maker implementation.

evidence.title: Fraxswap Contract Addresses
evidence.notes: Current first-party deployment documentation publishes V2 factory and router addresses across Arbitrum, Avalanche, BNB Smart Chain, Ethereum, Fantom, Fraxtal, Moonbeam, Moonriver, Optimism, and Polygon, while marking V1 deployments deprecated.
